text: A guideline for normal systolic blood pressure in an adult male would be:

options.text: 50 plus the man's age up to 150 mm. Hg.
65 plus the man's age up to 120 mm. Hg.
80 plus the man's age up to 130 mm. Hg.
100 plus the man's age up to 150 mm. Hg.

explanation: A commonly used clinical guideline for estimating systolic pressure in adults is 100 plus the person's age, typically capped at approximately 150 mmHg.
